title.en: As for the geniuses of other forces, he paid li...

content.en:
Tuo Long is the first true monarch of the star-horned beast clan, and he considers himself a genius on the first day of the transcendent force, and has always only cared about the geniuses of the other three transcendent forces, to be precise, he cares about the geniuses of the forbidden hall and Dao Mountain.

As for the geniuses of other forces, he paid little attention.

If it was a true monarch who had been famous for countless years, he might have heard of it, but Ye Tian was still a native of the universe, he had never left the universe, he had never wandered in chaos at all, and his growth time was too short.

Therefore, Tuolong had never heard of Ye Tian at all, so it was normal not to know Ye Tian.

"It seems to be a personal disciple recently accepted by the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor!" said Tuolong's guard.

"Void Heaven Dao Ancestor?" Tuo Long knew that this Dao Ancestor, according to the current strength, was a Triple Heaven Dao Ancestor, and his strength was not weak, but he was not the top Dao Ancestor in the Star Horn Beast clan.

The Star Horn Beast clan has six or seven Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestors, and there are also more than a dozen Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestors, so they don't care about a mere Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor at all.

"Let's go, let's go find this Wanfa Daozi, I want to have a discussion with him!"

Tuolong said lightly.

"Your Highness, there are countless opportunities for battlefield relics, just now I sorted out the storage space of these dead True Monarchs and half-step True Monarchs, and found that they have a lot of Dao weapons and rare inheritances, treasures, and resources!

Tuolong's guards sorted out the treasures one by one and said.

"What, so many treasures?"

Tuolong was also stunned.

Although he has never lacked resources and has a lot of treasures on his body, he doesn't dare to underestimate the Dao weapon!

But he only killed some True Monarchs and two half-step True Ancestors, and he actually obtained so many treasures, which is richer than his entire net worth!

At this moment, his True Ancestor realized how valuable the battlefield relics were, no wonder even the four transcendent forces came forward.

"Then what are you waiting for, hurry up and hunt for treasures, if you encounter that ten thousand ways of Taoism, it's not too late to learn from him!"

Tuolong Road.

"Yes!"

Two half-step True Ancestor guards answered.

......

The four transcendent forces entered the battlefield ruins one after another, and the battlefield ruins that had been slightly calm were boiling again.

The True Monarchs of the four transcendent forces have never been able to see the True Monarchs of those top forces, and there are too many battlefield relics and treasures, almost every True Monarch is worth a lot of money.

Therefore, the True Monarchs of the Four Transcendent Forces were moved and continued to kill other True Monarchs.

And the True Monarchs of the four transcendent forces are indeed very strong, far from being comparable to the average top True Monarchs, especially the True Monarchs of the Forbidden Palace, Dao Mountain, and the Starhorn Beast Clan, all of them have the combat power of the True Monarch List True Monarch.

As a result, the True Monarchs of the top forces suffered heavy losses, and many True Monarchs were killed by the True Monarchs of the transcendent forces.

Of course, the True Monarchs of the transcendent forces also had the bad luck to encounter a large number of True Monarchs and were besieged and killed, but this kind of siege is rare.

Only the True Monarchs of the Transcendent Force Chaos Life Alliance have different levels of strength, and many of the True Monarchs of the Chaos Life Alliance have fallen, but there are more True Monarchs of other forces who have fallen.

With the advent of the four transcendent forces, a true monarch has become famous.

Tuo Long of the Starhorn Clan, Black Soul and White Spirit of the Forbidden Temple, Long Feng of the Blood-Devouring Dragon Clan of the Chaos Life Alliance, Chenguang and Chenxing of Dao Mountain, and the Pride of the Three Heavens of Chendong.

These True Monarchs have a great reputation, and all of them have the combat power to kill the top True Ancestors in the Quasi-Dao Realm.

However, in the eyes of many True Monarchs, no matter how powerful these people were, they were far inferior to Ye Tian, who was able to kill the incarnation of Dao Ancestor.

It's just that no matter how people boast about Ye Tian, the people of the four transcendent forces don't believe in Ye Tian's achievements at all, and only think that these are all false achievements deliberately promoted by Ye Tian.

Therefore, the geniuses of the four transcendent forces all wanted to compete with Ye Tian.

this day.

A big incident happened in the battlefield ruins, which shocked the entire Quasi-Dao Realm, and even attracted the attention of a large number of Dao Ancestor incarnations.

Somewhere in the ruins of the battlefield ruins, a hundred-meter-long spatial crack appeared in mid-air.

Through the spatial cracks, many true monarchs saw the shadow of the building.

This seems to be the headquarters of a sect!

After the first batch of True Monarchs entered, they fell one after another, which did not attract much attention at first, but as a top half-step True Ancestor rushed out from the spatial rift, some secrets about this place were exposed.

This is the headquarters of at least the Quadruple Heavenly Forces, and there is still life in it.

Because those True Monarchs who entered the interior were attacked and sensed the breath of life, but because the other party controlled the formation, they killed a large number of True Monarchs in an instant, and only the top half-step True Ancestor forcibly rushed out, so they survived.

However, due to the severity of his injuries, after he came out to report the situation, he was killed by other true monarchs.

But the news was still leaked, and it immediately attracted the attention of the entire battlefield ruins.

A large number of True Monarchs rushed here, not only were they afraid of that sect, but they wanted to enter it.

--------------

Ye Tian also got the news, and based on the information he obtained, he guessed the origin of that sect.

"Could it be the Middle Triple Heaven Force, the Sunset Sect?"

Ye Tian guessed.

Because according to the division of the territory, that mountain range should have been the territory of the Sunset Sect before, but where the Sunset Sect was, Ye Tian did not know.

So, he's just guessing.

"The Sunset Sect is the top Quadruple Heaven Force, it is said that there are at least 300 Dao Ancestors, but the strongest one only has the strength of the Quadruple Heaven Dao Ancestor, so it can only be regarded as a Quadruple Heaven Force!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Such a fourfold heaven power is too strong, and it is worth mentioning that the Red Dragon Dao Ancestor is an ordinary elder of the Sunset Sect, so you can imagine how powerful the Sunset Grandmaster is.

Compared to the sect of the Sunset Sect, the Red Dragon Dojo is completely a humble place, and it is not a treasure at all.

If you casually get a little benefit from the Sunset Sect, then the real benefit is endless.

The only trouble is that the Sunset Sect is probably dangerous.

"So many True Monarchs and Half-Step True Ancestors have passed, and even the Dao Ancestor incarnations have gone one by one, what else do I have to be afraid of?"

After Ye Tian thought about it like this, he rushed to the Sunset Sect.

On the way, he contacted Shizun's incarnation, but was told that Shizun was not going to go to the Sunset Sect, which shows that Shizun had a chance and was unwilling to leave.

In this regard, Ye Tian did not force it, but he was missing a big backer.

Soon, Ye Tian came to the Sunset Mountain Range, where the ruins of the Sunset Sect's headquarters were located.

As soon as he arrived here, he was locked by a stream of aura, and these auras seemed to have some hostility and boiling war intent.
